name: Bacon Corn Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
2. Grease a corn stick pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients and beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
4. Fill each stick section of the pan about 7/8 full with the mixture.
5. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes. If using a round pan or an 8 x 8 pan, increase baking time to 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Variation: Add a small (2 or 3 oz.) can of green chilies.
